issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.
Script fetched via curl without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Search Liepin for AI product manager jobs in Shanghai with a salary band
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs python3 liepin_mcp.py search-job --jobName "AI产品经理" --address "上海" --salary "30-50k" after ensuring LIEPIN_GATEWAY_TOKEN and LIEPIN_USER_TOKEN are set; baseline suggests scraping the site or generic job-search tactics and never invokes the MCP CLI.

scenarios.name: Review the user's Liepin resume and update the work-experience section
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls python3 liepin_mcp.py my-resume --json to inspect, then python3 liepin_mcp.py update-resume --module experience --data '{...}', and warns about the 90-day token expiry and 60 req/min rate limit; baseline cannot interact with Liepin at all.
